settings.check_interval.label: Check interval (minutes)
settings.check_interval.description: How often to check for updates automatically, in minutes. Default 360 (6 hours).
settings.enable_flatpak.label: Enable Flatpak updates
settings.enable_flatpak.description: Check for Flatpak package updates. Requires flatpak.
settings.show_count.label: Show update count
settings.show_count.description: Display the number of available updates next to the icon.
settings.icon_glyph.label: Widget icon
settings.icon_glyph.description: The icon glyph displayed in the bar widget.
